calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-27-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-29-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Steven B. Mains, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A., a National Association.
No appearance by defendants NMZ LLC, a limited liability company, or Michelle Pender.
Defaults were entered against defendants on April 2, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on June 24, 2010.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on July 12, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A., a National Association, and against the Defaulted Defendants NMZ LLC, a limited liability company, and Michelle Pender as follows:

Damages/Principal - $166,627.56.
Prejudgment Interest - $13,240.00.
Attorney Fees - $2,825.00.
Late Fees - $623.57.
Costs - $551.90, for a total judgment in the amount of $183,868.03.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-29-2010 Continued To Sep-10-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
